RegistryEntry.description: One model entry in the catalog.

available.description: Operator availability flag; toggling False removes the entry from selector resolution without deleting the catalog row (D13 Tier-1).
available.title: Available

context_window.description: Maximum prompt+completion tokens this model accepts.
context_window.title: Context Window

cost_per_million_input_tokens.description: USD per 1,000,000 input tokens (pricing snapshot, refresh per D13).
cost_per_million_input_tokens.title: Cost Per Million Input Tokens

cost_per_million_output_tokens.description: USD per 1,000,000 output tokens (pricing snapshot, refresh per D13).
cost_per_million_output_tokens.title: Cost Per Million Output Tokens

id.description: UUID4 stable identity for this catalog entry.
id.title: Id

model_id.description: Provider-side model identifier (e.g. 'gpt-5.4', 'gpt-5-haiku'); the string the runtime passes to the provider's chat-completions API.
model_id.title: Model Id

provider.description: Closed enum: openai (extended in later slabs as new providers land).
provider.title: Provider

tier.description: Closed enum: reasoning | code | fast (drives auto-select policy).
tier.title: Tier

RegistryEntry.title: RegistryEntry

description: Catalog container with cascade-default + auto-select-enable flag.

auto_select_enabled.description: When True, cascade falls through to ModelSelectionPolicy auto-select rules after registry default is exhausted. False disables auto-select (per-call + per-specialist + registry default only).
auto_select_enabled.title: Auto Select Enabled

default_model_id.description: model_id of the entry the registry falls back to as `registry_default` in the cascade. Cross-field-validated to match an existing entry.
default_model_id.title: Default Model Id

id.description: UUID4 identity for this registry instance (snapshot of catalog state).
id.title: Id

title: PipelineRegistry
